fields.label: Organisation name
fields.official_basis: digital onboarding identifies the connecting organisation

fields.label: Organisation ODS code
fields.official_basis: onboarding and network approvals are organisation specific

fields.label: Product name
fields.official_basis: digital onboarding and SCAL both capture product identity

fields.label: Product summary
fields.official_basis: use case and legal basis must be explicit, not vague narrative
fields.expected_value: Optional supporting demographic enrichment behind default-off route flags.

fields.label: Purpose and use case
fields.official_basis: official onboarding expects purpose and use case to justify access
fields.expected_value: One or more bounded route-family use cases from pds_access_mode_matrix.csv

fields.label: Legal basis summary
fields.official_basis: the access-data guidance says requests are assessed case by case and legal review can be required
fields.expected_value: Direct care or patient self-service legal basis per access row

fields.label: Route family refs
fields.official_basis: Vecells must bind each PDS use case to exact route families
fields.expected_value: rf_patient_secure_link_recovery; rf_patient_home; rf_staff_workspace; rf_support_ticket_workspace; rf_governance_shell; rf_patient_requests

fields.label: Access modes used
fields.official_basis: the onboarding support page requires one risk log per access mode used

fields.label: Secure network connection expectation
fields.official_basis: the access-data page notes secure-network expectations for smartcard-backed use
fields.expected_value: HSCN or equivalent planned where smartcard or worker access is used

fields.label: Access method choice
fields.official_basis: official access guidance expects the access method to be justified
fields.expected_value: PDS FHIR only; no SMSP fallback hidden inside this task

fields.label: Why local matching alone is not enough
fields.official_basis: prompt 027 requires this to be structured per row

fields.label: Identity binding separation statement
fields.official_basis: Vecells identity law
fields.expected_value: PDS lookup never writes Request.patientRef directly; IdentityBindingAuthority only.

fields.label: Wrong-patient mitigation controls
fields.official_basis: risk-based assurance and hazard mitigation must be evidenced
fields.expected_value: freeze, review, audit, masking, rollback, no direct bind

fields.label: Hazard log reference
fields.official_basis: hazard log upload is mandatory in digital onboarding

fields.label: Connecting systems risk log refs
fields.official_basis: one risk log is required for each access mode used

fields.label: Mitigation evidence test plan
fields.official_basis: the test team arranges evidence testing of the listed mitigations
fields.expected_value: Browser and API rehearsal suite against each mitigation class

fields.label: Feature-flag default-off statement
fields.official_basis: prompt 027 mandatory gap closure
fields.expected_value: All PDS route flags stay off or internal_only until live gates clear

fields.label: Rollout cohort and blast radius
fields.official_basis: route family and cohort scoping are required to keep PDS optional and reversible

fields.label: Kill switch and rollback plan
fields.official_basis: prompt 027 requires rollback conditions and kill switches

fields.label: Named approver
fields.official_basis: real onboarding remains blocked without a named approver

fields.label: Environment target
fields.official_basis: live gates require an exact environment target

fields.label: Secret capture plan
fields.official_basis: seq_023 already freezes principal and certificate ownership rules

fields.label: DSPT and security posture
fields.official_basis: SCAL and digital onboarding both require IG and security evidence
fields.expected_value: current DSPT posture plus vault-backed secret plan

fields.label: Cloud and storage posture
fields.official_basis: official access pages warn that design details can be impacted by onboarding requirements
fields.expected_value: No real demographic fixtures in repo; masked logs only; audited storage classes only.

fields.label: Partner onboarding contact
fields.official_basis: SCAL and partner onboarding support routes are explicit on the official pages
